entity.summary: Ethereum decentralized exchange providing spot token trading through the Hello Labs trading interface.
entity.notes: CoinGecko identifies Hello DEX as an Ethereum decentralized exchange, links the first-party trading domain, and reports a recently updated live spot pair and non-zero 24-hour volume. The first-party interface could not be independently fetched during this review, so URL status remains live_unverified and confidence remains medium.

evidence.title: Hello DEX official trading interface
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party trading domain is linked from the current exchange registry, but the interface could not be independently fetched during this review.

evidence.title: Hello DEX Ethereum exchange profile and markets
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies Hello DEX as an Ethereum decentralized exchange, links the trading domain, and reports a recently updated spot pair with non-zero 24-hour volume.
